resources: Mild Moderate Severe A composite index used in dermatology to assess the severity and extent of psoriasis. It evaluates clinical parameters including erythema, induration, and scaling, weighted by the affected body surface area. The final score, ranging from 0 to 72, classifies the condition as mild, moderate, or severe. PASI Calculator District Erythema Desquamation Hardening" Area Select the score relative to erythema Select the score relative to induration" Select the score relative to desquamation Select the score relative to area Calculate PASI" The calculation was successful The calculation failed Complete the district: Complete all parameters. Result of PASI Calculation" Range of severity Score: Head Upper limbs Trunk Lower Limbs
